scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run infra:restart && npm run test:dummy-data && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:oriole: npm run infra:restart:oriole && npm run test:dummy-data && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:multigres: npm run infra:restart:multigres && DATABASE_ENGINE=multigres npm run test:dummy-data && DATABASE_ENGINE=multigres npm run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: npm run infra:restart && npm run test:dummy-data && npm run test:integration:coverage
scripts.test:coverage:ci: npm run infra:restart:ci && npm run test:dummy-data && npm run test:integration:coverage
scripts.test:oriole:ci: npm run infra:restart:ci:oriole && npm run test:dummy-data && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:vector:oriole:pgvector: VECTOR_BUCKET_PROVIDER=pgvector VECTOR_STORE_MIGRATIONS_ENABLED=true VECTOR_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres npm run infra:restart:oriole:pgvector && npm run test:dummy-data && VECTOR_BUCKET_PROVIDER=pgvector VECTOR_STORE_MIGRATIONS_ENABLED=true VECTOR_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres npm run test:integration -- src/test/pgvector-adapter.test.ts src/test/vectors-pgvector.test.ts
scripts.test:vector:multigres:pgvector: VECTOR_BUCKET_PROVIDER=pgvector VECTOR_DATABASE_CREATE=false VECTOR_STORE_MIGRATIONS_ENABLED=true VECTOR_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres npm run infra:restart:multigres && npm run test:dummy-data && VECTOR_BUCKET_PROVIDER=pgvector VECTOR_DATABASE_CREATE=false VECTOR_STORE_MIGRATIONS_ENABLED=true VECTOR_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/postgres npm run test:integration -- src/test/pgvector-adapter.test.ts src/test/vectors-pgvector.test.ts
scripts.test:multigres:ci: npm run infra:restart:ci:multigres && DATABASE_ENGINE=multigres npm run test:dummy-data && DATABASE_ENGINE=multigres npm run test:integration
scripts.infra:start: docker compose --project-directory . --profile monitoring -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:ci: docker compose --project-directory . -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:oriole: docker compose --project-directory . --profile monitoring -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-oriole-override.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:ci:oriole: docker compose --project-directory . -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-oriole-override.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:multigres: docker compose --project-directory . --profile monitoring -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-multigres-override.yml up -d && docker compose --project-directory . --profile monitoring -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-multigres-override.yml up -d --wait --wait-timeout 180 tenant_db && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:ci:multigres: docker compose --project-directory . -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-multigres-override.yml up -d && docker compose --project-directory . -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-multigres-override.yml up -d --wait --wait-timeout 180 tenant_db && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:oriole:pgvector: docker compose --project-directory . --profile monitoring -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-oriole-override.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-oriole-pgvector-override.yml up -d --build && sleep 5 && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:start:ci:oriole:pgvector: docker compose --project-directory . -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-oriole-override.yml -f ./.docker/docker-compose-infra-oriole-pgvector-override.yml up -d --build && sleep 5 && npm run migration:run
scripts.infra:restart: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start
scripts.infra:restart:ci: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:ci
scripts.infra:restart:oriole: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:oriole
scripts.infra:restart:ci:oriole: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:ci:oriole
scripts.infra:restart:multigres: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:multigres
scripts.infra:restart:ci:multigres: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:ci:multigres
scripts.infra:restart:oriole:pgvector: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:oriole:pgvector
scripts.infra:restart:ci:oriole:pgvector: npm run infra:stop && npm run infra:start:ci:oriole:pgvector
